strings: Are all vehicles owned by the named insured?
Are all drivers required to have valid CDL licenses where applicable?
Does the insured use any subcontracted or independent owner-operators?
Does the insured maintain written vehicle safety and maintenance programs?
Does the insured operate under any federal or state motor carrier authority?
Are any vehicles leased or rented to others?
Are any vehicles garaged at locations other than the insured premises?
Are MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually?
Are any vehicles used for livery or passenger conveyance?
